question: What is the concept of peptide-based plant disease resistance biomarkers?
options: Any plant protein can serve as biomarker
Measuring changes in defense peptide expression levels as early indicators of pathogen infection for precision agriculture
Peptide biomarkers only exist in animals
Plant diseases cannot be detected early
explanation: Changes in defense peptide expression profiles can serve as early biomarkers of plant pathogen infection, enabling timely intervention in precision agriculture and reducing crop losses.
